# grafanasilence_silence (Resource)

Manages a Grafana Alertmanager silence.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "grafanasilence_silence" "maintenance" {
  starts_at = "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z"
  ends_at   = "2026-03-01T06:00:00Z"
  comment   = "Scheduled maintenance window"

  matchers {
    name  = "alertname"
    value = "HighMemoryUsage"
  }

  matchers {
    name  = "env"
    value = "staging"
  }
}

# Using duration instead of ends_at (starts_at defaults to now)
resource "grafanasilence_silence" "deployment" {
  duration = "6h"
  comment  = "Deployment silence window"

  matchers {
    name  = "alertname"
    value = "HighErrorRate"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `comment` (String) Reason for the silence.

### Optional

- `created_by` (String) Author of the silence. Defaults to "terraform".
- `duration` (String) Duration of the silence (e.g. "6h", "30m"). Exactly one of ends_at or duration must be set.
- `ends_at` (String) End time in RFC3339 format. Exactly one of ends_at or duration must be set.
- `matchers` (Block List) Matchers that determine which alerts are silenced. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--matchers))
- `starts_at` (String) Start time in RFC3339 format. Defaults to the current time when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID assigned by the Alertmanager API.
- `status` (String) Current state: active, pending, or expired.
- `updated_at` (String) Last updated time from API.

<a id="nestedblock--matchers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `matchers`

Required:

- `name` (String) Label name to match.
- `value` (String) Value to match against.

Optional:

- `is_equal` (Boolean) Whether to match for equality (true) or inequality (false). Defaults to true.
- `is_regex` (Boolean) Whether value is a regex pattern. Defaults to false.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import grafanasilence_silence.maintenance <silence-uuid>
```
